sentences.english: This morning I decided to treat myself with a really nice takeaway coffee, and I ordered a large cappuccino, but when I looked at it, it was only half full.
sentences.korean: 오늘 아침 좋은 테이크아웃 커피로 자신에게 선물하기로 했는데, 라지 카푸치노를 주문했더니 반밖에 안 차 있었어요.

sentences.english: The word 'change' can refer to the money you get back after you've paid too much.
If the cashier only gives you £2 back instead of £3, they have short-changed you.
It doesn't just apply to money though.
If you feel you haven't been given as much as you deserve — like my cappuccino — you've been short-changed.
sentences.korean: 마땅히 받아야 할 만큼 못 받았다고 느끼면 — 제 카푸치노처럼 — 부당한 대우를 받은 거예요.
(관용구) 부당한 대우를 하다, 거스름돈을 적게 주다
